candidates.name: GOFFY micro intent fallback
reasons: Zero model bytes and zero external runtime dependencies.
Already wired as a non-executable PHONE/MAC/CLOUD hint for unsupported commands.
Keeps deterministic routing as the only executable authority.
risks: Coverage is limited to small vocabulary matching and cannot understand broad phrasing.
candidates.next_action: Keep as default fallback while benchmarking a smaller reusable classifier.

candidates.name: TensorFlow Lite Task Text NLClassifier
reasons: Purpose-built text classification API instead of a text-generation LLM.
Apache-2.0 dependency and official Android/mobile deployment path.
Supports a small custom intent model with labels such as PHONE, MAC, CLOUD, and UNKNOWN.
risks: Latest artifact is old enough to require dependency and vulnerability review before import.
Requires a trained model with metadata; no model asset is accepted until Moto benchmark evidence passes.
Native/runtime APK impact must be measured in modelDebug before any default-build consideration.
candidates.next_action: Train, export, or obtain a tiny metadata-backed classifier, run the eval-suite benchmark on the Moto G, then validate routing quality, APK delta, latency, and idle memory.

candidates.name: MediaPipe Text Classifier
reasons: Official Android text-classification task with built-in preprocessing.
Useful backup path if TensorFlow Lite Task Text is not acceptable.
risks: Documentation examples use dynamic Gradle versions; GOFFY requires a pinned version before probing.
MediaPipe dependency footprint may be larger than needed for a three-target intent classifier.
candidates.next_action: Probe only after selecting an exact version and proving APK impact in modelDebug.

candidates.name: fastText sentence classifier
reasons: Strong lightweight text-classification prior art with mobile-size model compression ideas.
risks: Native integration and maintenance risk are not justified before official Android classifier APIs are tried.
candidates.next_action: Use as algorithmic prior art only; do not import code into the Android app.

candidates.name: LiteRT-LM Granite 350M
reasons: Physical Moto G evidence shows safe non-executable behavior.
Rejected for production because latency and idle PSS exceed GOFFY LITE budgets.
risks: Too slow and memory-heavy for always-ready phone intent fallback.
candidates.next_action: Do not ship; retain only as benchmark evidence.
